---
title: "Webhooks"
description: "Vendor webhook event payloads"
---

All webhook events are sent via a POST request with the following payloads:

## vendor.created

```json
{
    "event": "vendor.created",
    "data": {
        "borrower": {
            "Id": "1234",
            "Name": "John Smith"
        }
    }
}
```

## vendor.updated

```json
{
    "event": "vendor.updated",
    "data": {
        "borrower": {
            "Id": "1234",
            "Name": "John Smith"
        }
    }
}
```

## vendor.deleted

```json
{
    "event": "vendor.deleted",
    "data": {
        "borrower": {
            "Id": "1234",
            "Name": "John Smith"
        }
    }
}
```
